# 3 Quick WordPress Tips to Level Up Your Business in 2025

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-01-18 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 466

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Looking to level up your online business in 2025?

Without further ado, below are a few WordPress tips 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6JEZyiRK3cy68y8nSKtB9KGXPaQA_KAPN6Rl6prifE0 )
 that will help:

1. Get more things done

Ever heard of the Buyback principle?

The Buyback Principle states that you should continually use
EVERY resource you can to buy back your time. This can eventually
help you get more things done.

Here's what Dan Martell, the bestselling author of Buy Back Your
Time has to say.

“The little-known secret to reaching the next stage of your
business is spending your time on only the tasks that:

-  you excel at,

-  you truly enjoy

-  add the highest value (usually in the form of revenue) to
your business."

Now ask yourself… how can you reach the next stage of your
business by buying back your time?

Here’s one of the ways… business owners spend around 20 hours
monthly maintaining their WordPress sites. By handing over
WordPress maintenance 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.oh52tdF4QGtsjFt-bGSz5pxw__KsfNRj75FikW9SkWQ )
to the experts, you can INSTANTLY buy back these 20 hours. That
means you can focus on what you excel at and get more things
done!

2. Make incremental improvement

Incremental improvement is an approach by which you focus on
making smaller improvements that slowly but surely move the
business toward success.

Want to make incremental improvements to your business? Focus on
making one small change at a time.

30 incremental improvements to make on your site 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6JEZyiRK3cy68y8nSKtB9KGXPaQA_KAPN6Rl6prifE0 )


Pro tip: Start from Tip #10 because the first few tips in the
above guide are meant for beginners.

3. Own a piece of the internet

Haven’t launched your online business yet?

There is a common saying: The right time to start was yesterday.
But good news… the second-best time is today!

Even if you think you're too early in the business idea, you can
make the first step by registering a domain name.

It’s like owning a piece of the internet. Here’s how to register
a domain name 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CGApdiJQZJ4itk_YegVT3lKxksXeteI5Jlnn2Oxhnjk )
 and get some for free.

Have a great rest of your week :)

Cheers,
